name: Crock Pot Italian Beef
recipeIngredient: 1 package Good Seasons Italian Dressing Mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix together water, gravy mix, dressing, and Italian seasoning.
2. Pour the mixture over the roast in the crock-pot.
3. Add peppers if desired.
4. Cook on LOW for about 2 hours.
5. Break up the roast and cook for an additional hour.
6. Serve on hamburger buns.
